arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals Johan Cruyff inspiration behind 'Angeball' Tottenham style
arts.sum: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou reveals his long love of the Dutch high-pressing style before facing AZ Alkmaar in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Jay-Z business partner names Premier League club he likes amid Tottenham takeover link
Dragusin’s agent discusses Napoli Interest and Tottenham commitment
arts.sum: Florin Manea, the agent of Radu Dragusin, recently spoke in an exclusive interview with Gonfialarete.com about his client’s situation and the rumored interest from Napoli. The Romanian defender, currently with Tottenham Hotspur, has been the subject of speculation regarding a potential move to the Italian club. When asked about the renewed interest from Napoli, Manea clarified, “I haven’t spoken to anyone, and I don’t believe Tottenham wants to let him go. Radu is focused and wants to seize his opportunities with the Spurs. I’ve seen the news, but—I repeat—I haven’t heard from anyone. We appreciate that many teams are following The post Dragusin’s agent discusses Napoli Interest and Tottenham commitment appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Maddison and Moore start, Werner call in Spurs team Postecoglou must pick vs AZ
arts.sum: Guest's team: Vicario; Porro, Dragusin, Van de Ven, Gray; Bentancur, Sarr, Maddison; Moore, Richarlison, Werner. Wilmot's team: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Dragusin, Davies; Gray, Sarr, Maddison; Johnson, Richarlison, Moore.

arts.ttl: Odobert returns, no Son, Sarr wrestling and things spotted in Spurs training
arts.sum: Son Heung-min was a notable absentee in the open training session at Hotspur Way. Following a recent spell on the sidelines due to a hamstring injury picked up in the game against Qarabag, the Tottenham captain made his return in last weekend's home win over West Ham. Tottenham have been handed a boost on the injury front going into Thursday's Europa League tie against AZ Alkmaar following Wilson Odobert's return to training.

arts.ttl: Every word Micky van de Ven said on Kudus melee, FA fine, Solanke impact and restaurant discount
arts.sum: With a high pressing team, I think if you want to play a high press, you need a high line because otherwise the distance between the attackers and the defence is going to be too big. Van de Ven had the opportunity to discuss his time with AZ and his subsequent move to Volendam, with the Dutch media at Hotspur Way keen to get more of an insight into the early years of his career.

arts.ttl: ‘Different level’: Jose Mourinho shares Europa League prediction involving Tottenham and Man United

arts.sum: As always, team news was up first, with Ange asked about Heung-Min Son, who didn't take part in training in the morning... Ange: "Sonny was a bit sore after the weekend, he was never going to be involved tomorrow anyway because he missed a bit.

arts.ttl: Tottenham Plotting Shock January Move for 'Exceptional' Striker
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are considering a move for Ipswich Town striker Liam Delap in the January transfer window.
